role: Brigadier General; Logistics and Support Deputy (d. 2 March 2026)
bio: Mohsen Darrebaghi served as a Brigadier General and Deputy for Logistics and Support in the Iranian Armed Forces. He was killed on 2 March 2026 during the [March 2026 Strike Wave](/events/march-2026-strike-wave), in the same strike that killed [Bahram Hosseini Motlagh](/people/bahram-hosseini-motlagh) and [Hassan-Ali Tajik](/people/hassan-ali-tajik).

sources.title: Senior Armed Forces Officers Killed in March 2 Strike

editorial_notes: Killed 2 March 2026. Brigadier General, Logistics and Support Deputy.
